name: Millworks Technologies IPO
overview: Millworks Technologies Limited is a precision engineering company engaged in manufacturing machined components, sheet metal parts and integrated assemblies for sectors including railways, aerospace, defence and semiconductors. The company operates through Build-to-Print (BTP) and Build-to-Spec (BTS) manufacturing models.
financials: For the period ended 30 November 2025, Millworks Technologies reported total income of ₹68.02 crore and PAT of ₹20.50 crore. In FY2025, total income was ₹22.42 crore with PAT of ₹5.25 crore.
strengths: Strong revenue and profit growth, exposure to aerospace, defence, railways and semiconductor sectors, and precision engineering capabilities.
risks: Customer concentration, working-capital-intensive operations, SME liquidity risk and manufacturing concentration.
gmpTrend: Grey Market Premium (GMP) changed from ₹300 on 14 Jul 2026 to ₹395 on 15 Jul 2026. GMP is unofficial market information and may change over time.
